name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: My Decision
body:
| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

**Just a few minutes ago I told _CBS This Morning_ that I will announce my decision about running for President on Monday, June 1st in my hometown of Central, South Carolina.**

The next president we elect will face the critical task of steering our nation back to a path of prosperity and security. We need someone who will do more than just talk about our nation's problems. We need a leader who is willing to tackle the tough issues head on and find bipartisan solutions.

If I decide to run for President, I will do everything possible to defeat those who want to destroy our nation and the values for which we stand. And if I do run, I will need a huge army of supporters and the funds necessary to run a winning campaign.

**[Would you please let me know that I can count on your support if I decide to run?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27834548:26749014958:m:1:877327319:2ACAADCEE9982765A513C4DC6216B14D:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27834548:26749014958:m:1:877327319:2ACAADCEE9982765A513C4DC6216B14D:r)

Over the next two weeks, I will continue listening to Americans like yourself who are concerned about what the future holds. I will discuss my ideas and conservative solutions for steering our country back onto a path of stability and strength.

Thank you for your friendship. Exciting days are ahead.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. There are two weeks until I make my announcement on June 1. Friend, you can be assured that if I run for the Republican nomination for President, I will run to win. Will you join my team today **[by making a contribution of $25, $50 $100, or whatever you can afford?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27834548:26749014958:m:1:877327319:2ACAADCEE9982765A513C4DC6216B14D:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27834548:26749014958:m:1:877327319:2ACAADCEE9982765A513C4DC6216B14D:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isVJzAK1NA).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVJzAK1NA) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVJzAK1NA)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42091242:17105309545:m:1:1349778030:357FD1885790D015B320CC3CAD29E466:r)
---
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw our campaign's latest video, which features highlights from my first trip as a presidential candidate to Iowa. The Iowa caucuses are the first opportunity for voters to weigh in on who they want our presidential nominee to be and that means I'll be making many more visits to the state over the coming months. But I need your help to make that happen. **[_Click here to watch the video and then donate to support our campaign in Iowa_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42091243:17105309545:m:1:1349778030:357FD1885790D015B320CC3CAD29E466:r)**. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42091243:17105309545:m:1:1349778030:357FD1885790D015B320CC3CAD29E466:r) A successful campaign in Iowa will require significant time and resources. We're going to put in the time, but I need your help to shore up our resources. Thanks for your help. Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42091244:17105309545:m:1:1349778030:357FD1885790D015B320CC3CAD29E466:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Let's talk over lunch
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842823:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r)
---
|

Peter, since announcing my campaign for President, I've been on the move.

Because I've been trying to talk with as many people as possible, it can be hard to really get to know people as much as I would like to.

**So my campaign is planning to fly one supporter, chosen at random, to join me for a private lunch on May 30th in Dallas, Texas. It will be a great opportunity to get to know each other, and I'm truly looking forward to it.
**
[**To be automatically entered, please donate $5 or more to Carson America now**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842823:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r).

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842823:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r)
---

Since declaring my candidacy in Detroit, the momentum has been incredible. Not only has Carson America received over 100,000 donations, but according to three new polls I am either tied for first place, or within the top tier in the race for the GOP presidential nomination.

I tell you this because it truly could not have happened without you.

Whoever ends up joining me for lunch in Dallas on May 30th, I want to personally tell him or her how much their support means to me and my family.

[**I hope you'll donate $5 or more to Carson America now to be automatically entered.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842823:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r)

Thank you, and I hope I'll get to see you soon.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS CONTEST** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this contest. You may enter contest without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842824:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "LUNCH WITH BEN" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27842825:26754430435:m:1:876315805:448D2A7644ACF872C499D869C53A9EFA:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Dallas, Texas, transportation, lunch at a location of the committee's choosing, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This contest is sponsored by Carson America. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

Rick Wiley
